headings.text: Talking about the Composition of PCB Price

sections.heading: Talking about the Composition of PCB Price
sections.text: Talking about the Composition of PCB Price Over the years, PCB price changes have been familiar with people inside and outside the industry, even though some people with years of experience in the PCB industry may not fully understand the ins and outs of this, so to analyze the main factors affecting pcb price: The diversity of prices caused by the different materials used in PCBs is based on common double-sided boards. Sheets generally include fr-4, cem-3, etc., and board thickness varies from 0.2mm to 5.0mm, and copper thickness varies from 0.5oz to 3oz. All of these have resulted in huge price differences on the sheet material; in solder mask inks, there are also certain price difference...
